identity: Human WOMAN (female), about 26 years old, long dark brown hair falling forward from beneath a deep purple hood, dark brown eyes, cool unreadable adult expression.
outfit: Deep purple hooded cloak with hood worn up, a round gold clasp at the throat, dark inner robe.
weapons: A heavy leather-bound grimoire with gold corners and a large round purple gemstone set in the center of the front cover, held in the left hand across the body.
attackStyle: East-facing. Grimoire open in the left hand, right hand thrust forward casting a jet of dark purple eldritch flame.
spellStyle: East-facing. Grimoire held in the left hand at chest height, right palm raised with a floating purple rune above it.
blockStyle: East-facing. Grimoire held across the chest in both hands as a guard, hood up, faint purple shimmer.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, grimoire fallen open beside her, head bowed, hood slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm hooded idle. Grimoire held against the chest in the left arm, right hand at her side.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep purple hood, long dark brown hair, round gold clasp at throat, heavy leather grimoire with a round purple gemstone on the cover held at her chest.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human WOMAN (female), about 26 years old, long dark brown hair falling forward from beneath a deep purple hood, dark brown eyes, cool unreadable adult expression.

OUTFIT: Deep purple hooded cloak with hood worn up, a round gold clasp at the throat, dark inner robe.

WEAPONS: A heavy leather-bound grimoire with gold corners and a large round purple gemstone set in the center of the front cover, held in the left hand across the body.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

AGE & PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): character is a fully-grown adult about 28-32 years old with standard heroic adult proportions (approximately 6 feet / 180 cm tall). NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT elderly, NOT a graybeard wizard.

BODY PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): realistic adult human head-to-body ratio — the head is approximately 1/7 to 1/8 of the total body height. TALL and SLENDER with long adult legs (roughly half of total height), a full-length adult torso, and normal-sized adult shoulders. NOT chibi, NOT bobblehead, NOT big-head-small-body, NOT child-bodied, NOT stubby. The silhouette must read as a tall adult, never as a kid in adult clothes.

SCALE (non-negotiable): full-body figure occupies approximately 85% of the 256x256 canvas height, feet near the bottom edge, head near the top — consistent scale with other adult humanoid characters in the same sprite set.

LIGHTING (non-negotiable): bright evenly-lit pixel art, NOT silhouetted, NOT overly dark, NOT cast in deep shadow. All colors, facial features, and outfit details must be fully readable.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.
